corporate_action_denial: Yesterday's denial did not fully kill the setup. It changed the risk.
The company response shook out weak hands, but the story still has to be watched through the tape.
corporate_action_filing: The formal notice makes the rumor easier to track now.
Once paperwork appears, the market stops guessing only from whispers.
corporate_meeting: With RUPSLB on the calendar, the trade becomes about expectation versus room outcome.
Meeting day gives the story a clock. That is why the tape can get jumpy.
corporate_action_resolution: The vote result turns speculation into a cleaner follow-through test.
Approval is not the finish line; it is where execution risk starts.
corporate_action_cancellation: Cancellation forces the market to reset the old rumor premium.
When the calendar breaks, fast money usually leaves first.
fallback: This follows an earlier related post, so the current tape has a reference point.
The story is no longer starting from zero.

all: Tape still setting up. Watching where leadership forms next.
